tasks.title: The 5-Minute Purge
tasks.description: Pick one drawer or desktop folder and delete/discard everything you don't need

tasks.title: New Playlist
tasks.description: Create a 5-song playlist for a very specific mood, like "Walking through a rainy neon city."

tasks.title: Doodle a Hybrid
tasks.description: Draw an animal combined with a household object (a Toaster-Turtle?).

tasks.title: Wiki-Rabbit Hole
tasks.description: Go to Wikipedia, click "Random Article," and read it until you find a link to a historical figure.

tasks.title: The "Six-Word Story"
tasks.description: Write a complete story using exactly six words (e.g., "Found a map. Lost the way.")

tasks.title: Update Your Bio
tasks.description: Refresh your LinkedIn, GitHub, or social media "About Me" section.
